nodes.name: Friday 2PM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: Friday 2:00 PM ET. Set n8n timezone to America/New_York.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Check
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Checks EMERGENCY_STOP env var. If true, notifies Discord and halts the workflow. Must be first node after trigger.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Pre-Post
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Second EMERGENCY_STOP check before writing data summary. Catches mid-execution stop activation.

nodes.name: Taostats 7d History
nodes.notes: SN106 pool history for the past 7 days.

nodes.name: CoinGecko TAO 7d
nodes.notes: TAO price chart data for the past 7 days.

nodes.name: CoinGecko SN106 7d
nodes.notes: SN106 alpha token price chart for the past 7 days.

nodes.name: Bridge Volume 7d
nodes.notes: Weekly bridge volume from Tracker/FastAPI. May not be available yet.

nodes.name: GitHub Repos
nodes.notes: Fetch repo list to count active repos in last 7 days.

nodes.name: Wait For All APIs
nodes.notes: Wait for all 5 parallel HTTP requests to complete before proceeding. Uses append mode with 5 inputs so the node waits for data on every branch.

nodes.name: Merge All Data
nodes.notes: Merge all 7-day data sources into a single object for the data summary.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: Safe default: DRY_RUN must be strictly 'false' to proceed. Any other value (true, undefined, empty) routes to dry-run log.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Prepare dry-run data summary for Discord notification. No filesystem writes for n8n Cloud compatibility.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN: Discord Log
nodes.notes: Send dry-run data summary to Discord for review.

nodes.name: Write Data Summary
nodes.notes: Store collected metrics in n8n static data (n8n Cloud compatible). No Claude API call. Run /generate-thread manually to create content.

nodes.name: Discord: Data Ready
nodes.notes: Notify that weekly data is collected and ready for manual content generation via /generate-thread.
